The '''MD-6 medical droid''' was a model of [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] and a part of the [[MD-series medical droid/Legends|MD-series]] that was manufactured by [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]]. It was manufactured exclusively for use by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]].<ref name="EGTD" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Rebellion]]'' {{1stm}}
